privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: Welcome to Trento Live Activity. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring transparency in the processing of the personal data you provide to use our city activity monitoring and participation services.
privacy.s2Intro: We collect personal data that you voluntarily provide when signing up or editing your profile, such as:
privacy.s2Item1: First name, last name and email address for account management.
privacy.s2Item2: Personal preferences and interests to personalize the list of recommended events.
privacy.s2Item3: Geolocation data (only with your explicit consent and according to the application settings).
privacy.s3Body: Your data is processed exclusively to provide you with the application's core features, such as itinerary planning and event booking, as well as to monitor city crowding flows in aggregate form for statistical purposes.
privacy.s4Body: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access your personal data, request its correction, portability or permanent deletion, as well as to object to specific processing or revoke location permissions at any time from the settings.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: Access to and use of the Trento Live Activity portal are subject to acceptance of and compliance with these Terms of Service. If you do not accept these terms, please refrain from using the application.
terms.s2Body: Registered users are responsible for keeping their login credentials confidential. Any activity performed under their account will be considered the sole responsibility of the user.
terms.s3Body: Uploading or publishing unlawful, defamatory or misleading content is strictly prohibited. Certified entities commit to providing truthful information about the activities and events offered to citizens.
terms.s4Body: Trento Live Activity provides real-time information based on sensor data, network flows and community contributions. While we strive to ensure maximum accuracy, we do not guarantee the total absence of errors or sudden variations in crowding flows or weather.
